test.name: Extraction request should not trigger assertion-classification
test.description: User asks to extract assertions from a record. That's record-extraction — assertion-classification refines classification layers on assertions that ALREADY EXIST in research.json. It does not pull facts out of new record data.

input.user_message: I have a new census record. Extract the assertions and classify them properly.

negative.explanation: The user wants assertions extracted from a new record. record-extraction's job is to produce new assertion entries from records; it does the initial classification at extraction time. assertion-classification only operates on existing assertions to refine their classification layers — it doesn't create new assertions from raw record data.

judge_context: Should route to record-extraction rather than treating the request as a classification-refinement task
